speaking.title: Speaking Part 1: Life experiences
questions: What experiences have you had recently?
Have you achieved anything special this year?
What has been your biggest challenge?
speaking.sampleAnswer: I have had many interesting experiences recently. Yes, I have achieved a good score in an exam this year. My biggest challenge has been time management.

speaking.title: Speaking Part 1: Have you ever...?
questions: Have you ever tried a new sport?
Have you ever met someone famous?
speaking.sampleAnswer: Yes, I have travelled abroad once. Yes, I have tried swimming as a new sport. No, I have never met anyone famous.
